doubl.commitSubject: feat(product): develop fit preference, prediction, and recommendation software

mds.commitSubject: feat(admissions): automate graduate data science applications
mds.description: Engineered a full-stack platform to automate the Masters of Data Science graduate admissions process, managing over 1,000 annual applications for 50+ faculty. Developed a comprehensive system featuring secure role-based access, robust data integrity, real-time interactive dashboards, and automated review and reporting engines, significantly streamlining the entire workflow from applicant ingestion to final decision-making.

makerspace.commitSubject: feat(membership): automate enrollment, booking, and access for 1000+ members
makerspace.description: Architected a comprehensive full-stack membership platform serving 1,000+ members, digitizing workshop enrollments, equipment reservations, and secure recurring payments. Engineered robust backend systems for automated physical access control, real-time notifications, and administrative oversight, significantly streamlining operations and enhancing user experience.

learncoding.commitSubject: feat(learn): build adaptive learning platform with AI and gamification
learncoding.description: Engineered an adaptive learning platform serving over 500 students with interactive code visualizers, gamified learning paths, and AI-powered content generation for personalized, multi-language instruction. Integrated with the UBC Canvas API to automate grade posting, established robust role-based access controls for 60+ faculty, and managed full-stack infrastructure, significantly reducing administrative overhead and enhancing user engagement.

teaching-assistant.commitSubject: feat(teaching): instructed and evaluated 350+ CS students
